summary: Journey Test #1 COMPLETE: Full Venue Acquisition → Publish Pipeline. All 29 tests passed (100%). Successfully tested the complete lifecycle: Specialist creates draft → fills mandatory fields → submits for review → Team Lead sends to data refinement → Data Team refines with Venus Assist → Manager approves → Manager initiates onboarding → Owner accepts via public token → Manager publishes → Venue appears in public search.

P2_polish.description: Test function returns dict instead of None (pytest warning)
P2_polish.impact: No functional impact, just a pytest best practice warning
P2_polish.recommendation: Remove return statement from test function

tests: acquisition_id returned, status='draft', completeness object returned
Submission blocked without mandatory fields (validation works)
GET /api/acquisitions/{acq_id} as vam can view submitted capture
PUT /api/acquisitions/{acq_id} as admin (data_team substitute) can edit during refinement
GET /api/acquisitions/venus-assist/{acq_id} returns quality checks (readiness, blockers, issues, suggestions)
Venus Assist runs at approval time (blockers would prevent approval)
POST /api/onboarding/send/{acq_id} generates token and onboarding link
Delivery results contain channel statuses (email: delivered, whatsapp: link_generated)
Venue appears in public venue search (/api/venues?city=Delhi)
venue_specialist cannot transition from submitted_for_review (400 error)
Cannot submit without mandatory fields (400 with missing fields list)

critical_code_review_comments: acquisitions.py: Well-structured 667-line backend with clear status pipeline and role permissions
acquisitions.py: MANDATORY_FIELDS validation correctly enforced at submission time
acquisitions.py: Venus Assist (run_venus_assist) provides comprehensive quality checks with blockers, issues, suggestions
acquisitions.py: Send-back and rejection correctly require reason
onboarding.py: Token-based public access works correctly for owner acceptance
onboarding.py: Email delivery via Resend working (status: delivered)
onboarding.py: WhatsApp deep link generation working
publish.py: 7-point readiness gate comprehensive (owner_onboarding, identity_fields, media_minimum, pricing_posture, publishable_summary, no_risk_flags, venue_active)
publish.py: Publish creates public venue record in venues collection
publish.py: Published venue correctly appears in public search

test_credentials.data_team: No dedicated account - used admin as substitute

seed_data_creation: Created test acquisition acq_abca76ad8dac which progressed through full pipeline to published_live status. Published as venue_e031b2acdb4f in public venues collection.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Journey Test #1 complete. Full Venue Acquisition → Publish pipeline verified working. Status pipeline: draft → submitted_for_review → under_data_refinement → awaiting_manager_approval → approved → owner_onboarding_pending → owner_onboarding_sent → owner_onboarding_viewed → owner_onboarding_completed → published_live. All role accounts working (specialist, teamlead/vam, venue_manager, admin). Venus Assist quality checks working. Onboarding token-based flow working. Publish readiness gate (7 checks) working. Published venues appear in public search.

mocked_apis.notes: Email delivery via Resend is REAL (status: delivered). WhatsApp is deep link generation only (not actual message send).

role_permissions_verified.venue_specialist: Can create, submit, edit own drafts/sent-back
role_permissions_verified.vam: Can review submitted, send to data refinement, send back, reject
role_permissions_verified.data_team: Can edit during refinement, send to manager approval (tested via admin)
role_permissions_verified.venue_manager: Can approve, initiate onboarding, send onboarding, publish
